message:
test(proptest): expand 13 proptest files to 30+ tests each (ft-3mcip)

cuckoo_filter (36), disjoint_intervals (32), self_stabilize (32),
storage_expanded (37), dancing_links (31), fibonacci_heap (32),
interval_tree (32), kd_tree (31), pairing_heap (32), r_tree (33),
sparse_table (31), wal_engine (32), wavelet_tree (32)
